description: The doll arrived without a sender. Its card said, 'For the daughter who should have been mine.'
What is the first impossible clue?
Its card said, 'For the daughter who should have been mine.' Adrian Cole was a widowed father raising his eight-year-old daughter when the story began in a snowbound family home on Christmas Eve.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
